name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.2 Google OAuth public policy links
label: Google OAuth public policy links
release_notes: Adds direct public Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Google access explanation pages suitable for Google Auth Platform app-domain links.
notes: Adds public URL-routed Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages for Google Auth Platform branding links.
Adds a public Google access explanation page summarising the intended OAuth consent-screen settings and Pathmark permission behaviour.
Adds visible Home and About & Privacy links to the public policy pages so the OAuth app domain pages are easy to find.
Keeps these pages accessible without signing in, so Google consent-screen review and users can open them directly.
Retains the mobile-first hosted UI from v0.7.1.
